content: {"key_findings": ["Round 1 established the Scientific baseline with multiple meta-analytic sources on IF metabolic outcomes", "The initial retrieval skews toward Scientific; Regulatory, Economic, Public_Health long-term, Regional, and Emerging_Trends are underrepresented", "Long-term safety evidence (population-level cardiovascular mortality cohorts) has not yet surfaced", "Real-world adherence data from commercial apps partially present but not deep"], "perspective_gaps": ["Regulatory", "Economic", "Public_Health", "Regional", "Emerging_Trends"], "web_queries": ["AHA 2024 NHANES time-restricted eating cardiovascular mortality abstract", "intermittent fasting GLP-1 semaglutide head-to-head metabolic syndrome trial", "Ramadan intermittent fasting cardiovascular outcomes systematic review Muslim adults", "FDA intermittent fasting therapeutic claim guidance site:fda.gov", "intermittent fasting cost-effectiveness QALY diabetes metabolic syndrome", "commercial intermittent fasting app retention BMI stratified outcomes"], "academic_queries": ["intermittent fasting long-term cardiovascular mortality observational cohort", "Ramadan fasting cardiovascular outcomes systematic review meta-analysis", "intermittent fasting human circadian clock gene expression clinical trial"], "exa_queries": ["long-term intermittent fasting prospective cohort 12 months mortality"], "convergence_assessment": "expanding", "should_continue": true, "reasoning": "Round 1 covered Scientific baseline. Round 2 should close Regulatory, Public_Health long-term, Regional, and Emerging_Trends gaps.", "knowledge_gaps": ["Long-duration prospective cohort CV mortality data under IF", "Head-to-head IF vs GLP-1 RA comparisons", "Regulatory positions (FDA/EFSA/EMA) on IF", "Ramadan pooled cardiovascular outcomes", "LMIC-specific IF trials"]}
